title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 285.306 - Failure to complete form, penalty
text:
285.306.  Failure to complete form, penalty. — Every employee shall complete the withholding form referred to in section 285.300.  Any such employee who refuses to complete the withholding form shall be guilty of a class E felony.
(L. 1993 S.B. 253 § 22, A.L. 2014 S.B. 491) 
Effective 1-01-17
